code.description: Stable error code identifier, e.g. SR0001.

title.description: Short, human-readable title shown in error messages.

summary.description: One-line description of when this error occurs.

severity.description: How disruptive this error is. Errors fail the build; warnings print but proceed; deprecations suggest migration; info is purely advisory.

since.description: Swift-Rust version that introduced this code.

causes.description: Bullet list of common root causes. Used in CLI help and search.

fixes.description: Bullet list of concrete remediation steps. Mirrors the H2 sections of the body.

related.description: Cross-references to other SR codes that frequently appear together with this one.
